best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — only consistently profitable bucket; this is the primary target range; enforce hard ceiling at 60 (n=2, sample small but directionally clean)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — skip entirely; this is now a confirmed gap-up trap pattern
overnight_hold_insights: Zero genuine overnight carries across all 17 sessions. Policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion all required simultaneously. No position has met all six criteria simultaneously. The thin, extended candidate pool continues to prevent qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates.

notes_for_next_session:
FOR MIDDAY AGENT (2026-06-23 ~12:00 PM).

BOOK STATE: Flat. Equity $99,938.80. 0 PDT trades used. No open positions.

MARKET OPEN RECAP: Complete sell-off at the open. All 5 watchlist names gapped down hard:
- ANET: opened at $162.24 (-7.1% from prev close $174.63), RSI 11.9 — full reversal of PM gains
- IBKR: opened at $92.63 (-4.3% from prev close $96.83), RSI 6.5 — PRIMARY TARGET crushed
- FCX: opened at $63.97 (-7.7% from prev close $69.28), RSI 5.9
- PANW: opened at $286.25 (-0.07%), RSI 50.1 — below entry zone, ATR% 0.254 below floor
- MGM: opened at $46.27 (-0.6%), RSI 22.7

Not a single symbol cleared the green-on-day gate or RSI 55-60 entry zone. This was a gap-down open day — correct to stay flat and preserve capital.

MIDDAY WATCH: If any names recover sharply (especially IBKR or PANW back above their EMAs), those could set up for a midday reclaim pattern. However:
- IBKR and ANET need massive recovery just to get back to entry zone; unlikely intraday
- PANW is closest to recovery but RSI 50 and ATR% 0.254 (below 0.30 floor) suggest choppy action
- FCX rel_vol 1.74 is notable — copper may be moving on macro news; monitor for recovery if copper bid returns

HARD RULES UNCHANGED: RSI 55-60 only. rel_vol >= 1.3. ATR% >= 0.30. No chasing.

10 consecutive no-entry sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through today). Capital fully preserved. Cumulative alpha maintained.
